subject: [PATCH 05/13] mm: add PMD swap entry detection support

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds support for detecting PMD (Page Map Directory)-level swap entries in the Linux kernel. Currently, when a huge page is swapped out, it's split into 512 PTE-level (Page Table Entry) swap entries, which can lead to loss of huge page information across swap cycles. This patch introduces infrastructure to detect PMD-level swap entries and adds helpers to set and clear an exclusive overlay bit in these entries. The goal is to preserve huge page information during swap operations.
